message:
🌱 Add rook: Scrubbing is preventing cluster updates mission (#1776)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "rook-2240-scrubbing-is-preventing-cluster-updates",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "rook: Scrubbing is preventing cluster updates",
+    "description": "Scrubbing is preventing cluster updates. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current rook deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your rook version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nhelm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working rook installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review rook configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant rook configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook\n```\n**Is this a bug report or feature request?**\n* Bug Report\n\n**Deviation from expected behavior:**\nChanging the cluster CRD doesn't cause changes to the cluster with error:\n\n```\n2018-10-25 1945.693175 I | op-osd: checking if any nodes were"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Scrubbing is preventing cluster updates",
+        "description": "The Ceph cluster should be considered clean for orchestration if the PGs are in the following states:\n- `active+clean`\n- `active+clean+scrubbing`\n- `active+clean+scrubbing+deep`\n```yaml\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.693175 I | op-osd: checking if any nodes were removed\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768366 I | op-osd: adding node k8s-nvme-01.sdsc.optiputer.net to the removed nodes list\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768384 I | op-osd: processing 1 removed nodes\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768387 I | op-osd: processing removed node k8s-nvme-01.sdsc.optiputer.net\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768540 I | exec: Running command: ceph status --cluster=rook --conf=/var/lib/rook/rook/rook.config --keyring=/var/lib/rook/rook/client.admin.keyring --format json --out-file /tmp/679034901\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.983434 W | op-osd: skipping t\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook\nkubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Scrubbing is preventing cluster updates\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The Ceph cluster should be considered clean for orchestration if the PGs are in the following states:\n- `active+clean`\n- `active+clean+scrubbing`\n- `active+clean+scrubbing+deep`",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2018-10-25 19:05:45.693175 I | op-osd: checking if any nodes were removed\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768366 I | op-osd: adding node k8s-nvme-01.sdsc.optiputer.net to the removed nodes list\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768384 I | op-osd: processing 1 removed nodes\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768387 I | op-osd: processing removed node k8s-nvme-01.sdsc.optiputer.net\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.768540 I | exec: Running command: ceph status --cluster=rook --conf=/var/lib/rook/rook/rook.config --keyring=/var/lib/rook/rook/client.admin.keyring --format json --out-file /tmp/679034901\n2018-10-25 19:05:45.983434 W | op-osd: skipping the removal of node k8s-nvme-01.sdsc.optiputer.net because it is not safe to do so: cluster is not fully clean. PGs: [{StateName:active+clean Count:7664} {StateName:active+clean+scrubbing+deep Count:4}",
+        "k8s-nvme-01.sdsc.optiputer.net PGs: [{StateName:active+clean Count:7664} {StateName:active+clean+scrubbing+deep Count:4}",
+        "if pg.StateName == clusterStateActiveClean && pg.StateName ==\"deep\" && pg.StateName ==\"scrubbing\" && pg.Count == status.PgMap.NumPgs {\n...\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "rook",
+      "graduated",
+      "storage",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "rook"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Node"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/rook/rook/issues/2240",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/rook/rook",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/rook/rook/pull/2293"
+    },
+    "reactions": 14,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-26T06:33:55.265Z",
